---
title: "Charleston"
subtitle: "Race, Water, and the Coming Storm"
author: "Susan Crawford"
title-slide-attributes:
 #   data-background-image: "earthrise_vis_1092_lrg.png"
    data-background-size: cover
    data-background-opacity: "0.5"
format:
 revealjs:
   incremental: true   
   background-opacity: 0.2
   theme: [michigan.scss, charleston.scss]
css: styles.css
---


![](https://i.pinimg.com/600x315/29/86/c4/2986c42c9807f3ff50d4292023102e1a.jpg)


## What is different 

- 5 billion tones of concrete *per year*
- 1 billions humans live on coasts, 200 million must move in your lifetime, 2 million from Florida
- speed of change 

## 

![](https://static01.nyt.com/images/2025/10/15/multimedia/2025-09-03-future-wet-nyc-index/2025-09-03-future-wet-nyc-index-videoSixteenByNineJumbo1600-v5.jpg)
